name: LicenseTypes
summary: Different licensing modes that Rhino can run in

enum_values.name: Standalone
enum_values.summary: Standalone license installed on this computer.

enum_values.name: ZooAutoDetect
enum_values.summary: Classic Zoo license with the Zoo server automatically detected at runtime.

enum_values.name: ZooManualDetect
enum_values.summary: Classic Zoo license with the Zoo server specified by hostname or IP
